name: oh-my-claudecode
description: Throughput-governed multi-agent orchestration: parallel edits, team coordination, hands-off lifecycle, loop-until-verified. Use for many independent units or autonomous runs.

skills.name: ultrawork
skills.description: Many independent edits, pure throughput, no verification loop.
examples: do these independent edits at once

skills.name: team
skills.description: Workers must coordinate/message on a shared task list.
examples: scope then execute with implementer + reviewer
여러 워커가 공유 태스크 보면서 협업하게 해줘

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: From a 2-3 line idea, run the whole lifecycle hands-off.
examples: just build this from my brief
이 아이디어로 처음부터 끝까지 알아서 다 만들어줘

skills.name: ralph
skills.description: Keep going on its own until the work is verified complete.
